see_also.label: Lundens copy (c. 1649)
see_also.location: National Gallery, London (on loan from Rijksmuseum)
see_also.note: Miniature oil copy (66×85 cm) made while Rembrandt's original was still intact. Crucial record of what was cut away in 1715 when the canvas was trimmed to fit a new location — shows the full composition with two figures on the left and more space overhead.
